descriptors.descriptor_text: Can prepare and cook a simple meal unaided
Needs to use an aid or appliance to be able to either prepare or cook a simple meal
Cannot cook a simple meal using a conventional cooker but is able to do so using a microwave
Needs prompting to be able to either prepare or cook a simple meal
Needs supervision or assistance to either prepare or cook a simple meal
Cannot prepare and cook food
Can take nutrition unaided
Needs prompting to be able to take nutrition
Cannot convey food and drink to their mouth and needs another person to do so

descriptors.activity_name: Managing therapy or monitoring a health condition
descriptors.descriptor_text: Either does not receive medication/therapy or can manage it unaided

descriptors.activity_name: Managing therapy or monitoring a health condition
descriptors.descriptor_text: Needs to use an aid or appliance to manage medication

descriptors.activity_name: Managing therapy or monitoring a health condition
descriptors.descriptor_text: Needs prompting to take medication or monitor a health condition

descriptors.activity_name: Managing therapy or monitoring a health condition
descriptors.descriptor_text: Cannot manage medication or therapy or monitor health condition even with supervision
Can wash and bathe unaided
Needs supervision or prompting to wash or bathe
Needs assistance to wash their body between the waist and neck
Cannot wash and bathe at all and needs another person to wash entire body
Can manage toilet needs or incontinence unaided
Needs assistance to manage toilet needs
Needs assistance to manage incontinence of either bladder or bowel
Can dress and undress unaided
Needs to use an aid or appliance to dress or undress
Needs assistance to dress or undress lower body
Can express and understand verbal information unaided
Needs an aid or appliance and prompting to express or understand verbal information

descriptors.activity_name: Reading and understanding signs, symbols and words
descriptors.descriptor_text: Can read and understand basic and complex written information unaided

descriptors.activity_name: Reading and understanding signs, symbols and words
descriptors.descriptor_text: Needs prompting to read or understand complex written information

descriptors.activity_name: Engaging with other people face to face
descriptors.descriptor_text: Can engage with other people unaided

descriptors.activity_name: Engaging with other people face to face
descriptors.descriptor_text: Needs prompting to engage with other people

descriptors.activity_name: Engaging with other people face to face
descriptors.descriptor_text: Needs social support to engage with other people

descriptors.activity_name: Engaging with other people face to face
descriptors.descriptor_text: Cannot engage with other people due to such engagement causing overwhelming psychological distress
Can manage complex budgeting decisions unaided
Needs assistance to make complex budgeting decisions
Cannot make any budgeting decisions at all
Can plan and follow the route of a journey unaided
Needs prompting to undertake any journey to avoid overwhelming psychological distress
Cannot plan the route of a journey
Cannot follow the route of an unfamiliar journey without another person
Cannot undertake any journey because it would cause overwhelming psychological distress
Can stand and then move more than 200 metres either aided or unaided
Can stand and then move more than 50 metres but no more than 200 metres either aided or unaided
Can stand and then move unaided more than 20 metres but no more than 50 metres
Can stand and then move using an aid or appliance more than 20 metres but no more than 50 metres
Can stand and then move more than 1 metre but no more than 20 metres either aided or unaided
Cannot either aided or unaided stand or move more than 1 metre
